expectations.text: Uses mindos CLI commands (mindos file create/write/append) to save content
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows `mindos file create "decisions/2026-04-06-user-feedback-system-nps.md" --content "..."` in Step 4.

expectations.text: Includes structured meeting note with date, topic, decision, and rationale
expectations.evidence: Content includes 决策摘要, 背景, 决策内容, 参与者, 理由, and 后续 TODO sections.

expectations.text: Places file in appropriate subdirectory (not KB root)
Bootstraps KB tree before writing (mindos file list)
